checkList: Price fields must only use data with date <= asOfDate
No future close / next close used as input feature
No label-like fields (returnPct, outcomePrice, realizedReturnClass) in feature set
asOf parameter must be passed from simulation/scoring caller
Technical indicators (MA, RSI, MACD, momentum) computed only from PIT-gated data
Date format must be consistent between storage and gate comparison
Quote.gateImplementation: date: { lte: asOfDb } where asOfDb = asOf.replace(/-/g, '') (YYYYMMDD)
Quote.criticalCheck: DATE_FORMAT_CONSISTENCY: sync stores ISO, gate uses YYYYMMDD — mismatch may make gate ineffective for same-year future records

checkList: Regime must be determined only from TAIEX data with date <= asOf
Rolling window (MA50, MA200, 20d momentum, 60d volatility) must not include future rows
detectRegime(asOf) must use ISO asOf directly with ISO stored dates
detectRegimeForPeriod is backtest-only — must not be used in simulation scoring path
Market regime label (Bull/Bear/Sideways) derived from backward-looking factors only
Regime.gateImplementation: date: { lte: asOf } where asOf is ISO YYYY-MM-DD (ISO-ISO comparison correct)
Regime.criticalCheck: FORMAT_CONSISTENCY: MarketIndex.date appears to be ISO (from sync), detectRegime uses ISO asOf directly — CORRECT

checkList: InstitutionalChip data must only use date <= asOfDate
Chip strength calculated from last 10 records (orderBy date desc) — all backward
Fields used (totalBuy, foreignBuy, trustBuy) are net flow — no forward-looking component
Publication lag: chip for T published at ~6pm T — same-day inclusion is industry standard for end-of-day scoring
Schema comment 'YYYYMMDD' must be corrected to 'ISO' to match actual storage
Date format must be consistent (same issue as Quote)
Chip.gateImplementation: date: { lte: asOfDb } where asOfDb = asOf.replace(/-/g, '') (YYYYMMDD)
Chip.criticalCheck: DATE_FORMAT_CONSISTENCY: sync stores ISO (confirmed in syncInstitutionalChip), gate uses YYYYMMDD — same mismatch as Quote
